message:
feat(mermaid): add half-block node interior fills with per-node color

- Add per-node fill background colors via DiagramPalette::node_fill_for()
- Apply half-block smoothing (upper/lower half blocks) for Rect/Rounded/Circle shapes
- Pass fill_bg through render_node_label, render_node_label_with_inset, render_class_compartments
- Skip half-block fills in ASCII mode and for transparent fills
- Add 4 tests for fill background, half-block characters, ASCII mode, and label background
- Update mindmap snapshots with new fill rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
